news.title: Who is John Ternus, the incoming Apple CEO?
news.summary: After 15 years, Tim Cook will hand off his role as Apple CEO to John Ternus, senior vice president of hardware engineering.

news.title: Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return
news.summary: Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic. Anthropic has agreed to spend $100 billion on AWS in return.

news.title: Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in 7 new countries
news.summary: Google is rolling out Gemini in Chrome in Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The company is rolling this feature out to both desktop and iOS in all of these countries except Japan.

news.title: Tim Cook stepping down as Apple CEO, John Ternus taking over
news.summary: The transition has been expected for some time and ends one of the longer and more impactful runs a CEO has had at any company. news.title: Google Photos adds new touch-up tools for ‘quick’ fixes
news.summary: You can use the new tools to remove blemishes, refine skin texture, brighten eyes, or whiten teeth in photos.

news.title: Tim Cook will still be Apple’s Trump whisperer
news.summary: Though Tim Cook is shedding his CEO title for the role of Apple's executive chairman, it appears he'll keep one of his most important duties: that of the company's Trump whisperer. news.summary: The multitrillion-dollar home of the iPhone, Mac, and so many other tech gadgets is getting a new leader this fall, as Apple has announced that Tim Cook will be replaced as CEO on September 1st by current hardware boss John Ternus. news.summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook has written a letter to the community as he prepares to step down from his role in September. "This is not goodbye. news.summary: Apple has appointed Johny Srouji as its new chief hardware officer, "effective immediately," according to an announcement on Monday. news.title: A Humanoid Robot Set a Half-Marathon Record in China
news.summary: An autonomous robot from the company Honor ran a half marathon in 50:26, beating the human record by 7 minutes.

news.title: Apple CEO Tim Cook Is Stepping Down
news.summary: John Ternus, the company’s senior vice president of hardware engineering, will replace Cook as CEO on September 1. Cook will stay on as executive chairman.
